- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions (none requested)
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

Execution Guidelines
- Progress tracking: use available tools to mark steps, add a summary, and read status before starting a new step.
- Communication: keep outputs concise; if a step is skipped, state that briefly; avoid printing full command outputs.
- Development: use the current directory as root; avoid external media/links unless required; note placeholders; ask for clarification when unsure.
- Folder creation: do not create new folders unless requested (aside from .vscode for tasks); run commands from the current workspace.
- Extension installation: only install extensions returned by get_project_setup_info.
- Project content: ensure generated components have purpose; default to Hello World only when requirements are missing.
- Task completion: project scaffolded and compiled, copilot instructions present, README up to date, and user has launch guidance.
- Work through each checklist item systematically and keep communication focused.
